domain: Premium Device Trade-In & Accelerated Resale Platform
design_philosophy: High-end electronics flagship store (Apple-grade) merged with a trustworthy financial platform. Professional, clean, minimal, generous white space, and optical alignment. NO generic flat components. Every component should feel tactile, crisp, and high-quality.

primary.name: Electric Blue
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, Progress Bars, Trust Badges, Interactive Highlights

background.name: Pure White
background.usage: Main page background, Hero section, Premium product displays

surface.name: Silver Off-White
surface.usage: Secondary panels, Feature Cards, Form Backgrounds (Apple-style surface)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight
scales.caption: text-xs tracking-wide uppercase font-semibold text-[#86868B]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12), Optical Alignment over mathematical, Content must breathe. Use Bento Grids for feature showcases.

surface_styles.card_default: bg-[#F5F5F7] rounded-3xl p-8 border border-white/50 shadow-sm
surface_styles.glass_header: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5EA]/50 sticky top-0 z-50

brand_selector_grid.style: Clean bento-style grid. Cards with hover lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow. Centered brand icon.
brand_selector_grid.icons: Use react-icons/si and react-icons/fa: FaApple, SiSamsung, SiSony, SiOneplus, SiXiaomi

price_estimator_card.style: High-contrast focal point. Large animated numbers (react-spring or framer-motion). Deep Graphite background with Pure White text, accented by Electric Blue.

device_questionnaire.style: Progressive disclosure. Step indicator (1/4). Large touch-friendly selection cards. Subtle transitions between steps.

seller_dashboard.style: Control-room grid. Clean metrics, 21-day countdown timer styled as a circular or crisp linear progress bar. Clear visibility of margins and statuses.

buy_storefront.style: Minimalist product grid. Focus purely on device imagery and condition badges. No distracting colorful boxes.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0066CC] hover:bg-[#0055AA] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5F5F7] hover:bg-[#E5E5EA] text-[#1D1D1F] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors

motion.page_enter: framer-motion: initial opacity-0 translate-y-4, animate opacity-100 translate-y-0, duration 0.5s

hero_image.usage: Hero background or prominent side image

product_images.usage: How it works / sell flow visualization

store_environment.usage: Store locator and Pickup checkout sections

strict_rules: NO default Inter for headings. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
Adhere strictly to the color palette. No arbitrary shadows; use the defined surface_styles.
Images MUST be sourced exclusively from the media object provided here. DO NOT use placeholders.
The layout must prioritize spaciousness (p-8 to p-12 padding) to evoke a premium Apple-store feeling.
All major interactive elements must include data-testid as specified.
